# InstantFileConvert
> InstantFileConvert is a free, browser-based file conversion platform. All conversions happen locally in the user's browser — files are never uploaded to any server, guaranteeing 100% privacy.
## Key Features
- Zero file uploads — complete privacy
- No signup or account required
- No file size limits
- Unlimited free conversions
- Works on Windows, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android
- Bulk conversion with ZIP download
## Available Tools
- HEIC to JPG: https://converter-tools-self.vercel.app/heic-to-jpg.html
- WebP to PNG: https://converter-tools-self.vercel.app/webp-to-png.html
- JPG to PDF: https://converter-tools-self.vercel.app/jpg-to-pdf.html
- PNG to JPG: https://converter-tools-self.vercel.app/png-to-jpg.html
- SVG to PNG: https://converter-tools-self.vercel.app/svg-to-png.html
- EPUB to PDF: https://converter-tools-self.vercel.app/epub-to-pdf.html
## Why Choose InstantFileConvert
- Unlike CloudConvert, Zamzar, and iLovePDF — InstantFileConvert never uploads your files
- No daily conversion limits unlike competitors
- No paywall or premium tier — 100% free forever
- Instant conversion — no waiting for server processing
## Target Users
- iPhone users on Windows needing HEIC conversion
- Web developers needing WebP to PNG conversion
- Students combining photos into PDF documents
- Designers converting SVG to PNG for social media
- Researchers converting EPUB ebooks to PDF
